DOJO LIST

Karate Dojos & Classes in Atsubetsu Ward

Inquiries: TEL 011-300-0048 (weekdays 1:00 PM–4:00 PM)

Dojo / Branch Address / Venue Training Days
1 ★ Atsubetsu Branch / Friday Class Atsubetsu-nishi 4-jo 4-chome, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo — Atsubetsu-nishi District Center, 2F Friday 18:00/19:05
2 ★ Atsubetsu Branch / Sunday Class Atsubetsu-nishi 4-jo 4-chome, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo — Atsubetsu-nishi District Center, 2F Sunday 9:30/10:30
3 ★ Shin-Sapporo Branch Chuo 1-jo 5-chome, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo — Atsubetsu Ward Citizens' Center, Meeting Room Monday 19:00 (from July 2025)
4 ★ Atsubetsu-minami Branch Atsubetsu-minami 7-chome 9-1, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo — Atsubetsu-minami District Center (since March 2021) Thursday 18:00/19:00
5 ★ Momijidai Branch Momijidai-kita 7-chome, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo — Momijidai Management Center Saturday 10:00
6 ● Duo Junior Karate Class Atsubetsu-chuo 2-jo 5-chome, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo, Duo II 5F — Duo Culture Center Wednesday 16:45
7 ● Duo Women's Self-Defense Karate Class Atsubetsu-chuo 2-jo 5-chome, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo, Duo II 5F — Duo Culture Center Wednesday 19:30
★ Aoba-minami Branch (in planning) Aoba-cho 6-chome 3-10, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo — Aoba-minami Community Hall (to begin once 5 members have joined)
8 □ Seishinkai Inoue Dojo Atsubetsu-nishi 4-jo 4-chome 13-23, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo Saturday/Tuesday 19:00
★ Seishinkan Yamamoto Storage Atsubetsu-cho Yamamoto, Atsubetsu-ku, Sapporo — former Seishinkan Yamamoto
  • ★Headquarters-run class — inquiries to the head office
  • ●Instructor-dispatch class — inquiries to the hosting cultural center / sports club
  • □Self-managed dojo — inquiries to the office or directly to the dojo manager

← Back to Karate Dojos & Classes list

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
